name: NEXUS Alert is a Chrome Extension that monitors NEXUS, Globa
goal: NEXUS Alert is a Chrome Extension that monitors NEXUS, Global Entry, and SENTRI appointment slots on ttp.cbp.dhs.gov and notifies users when slots open up. The MVP extension already works. Make this a complete, launchable product ready for Chrome Web Store and paying customers. Specifically: 1) BACKEND: Build out the Cloudflare Worker backend (in backend/) to handle server-side slot checking, user registration, email/push notifications via web push API, and Stripe payment integration for a freemium model (free=check every 30min, paid=4.99/mo=check every 2min with SMS/email alerts). 2) CHROME EXTENSION: Polish the extension — add onboarding flow, settings page for notification preferences (sound, desktop, email), location filtering by enrollment center, dark/light theme, and proper error handling with retry logic. 3) LANDING PAGE: Complete the Next.js marketing site (in web/) with pricing section, FAQ, testimonials placeholder, email capture form, Chrome Web Store install button, and SEO optimization. 4) MONETIZATION: Integrate Stripe checkout flow for premium tier, add license key validation in the extension. 5) TESTING: Add unit tests for the background service worker logic and integration tests for the backend API. 6) DOCS: Add proper README with setup instructions, architecture overview, and deployment guide.
